headline: Q4 Earnings Outperformers: Veralto (NYSE:VLTO) And The Rest Of The Environmental and Facilities Services Stocks
summary: Let’s dig into the relative performance of Veralto (NYSE:VLTO) and its peers as we unravel the now-completed Q4 environmental and facilities services earnings season.

headline: Veralto Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
summary: Veralto Corporation (NYSE: VLTO), a global leader in essential water and product quality solutions dedicated to Safeguarding the World's Most Vital Resources™, announced that it will webcast its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, beginning at 7:30 a.m. ET.

raw.headline: Veralto Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call

headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Veralto, Lowers Price Target to $110
summary: Stifel  analyst Nathan Jones   maintains Veralto (NYSE:VLTO) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $118 to $110.
